title: Fast Fiction Factory Local Extraction Adapter Spike
purpose: Local-first deterministic extraction adapter spike that converts a sample raw memo into an Extraction Contract payload and validates it through the existing zero-dependency validator before any model/API behavior, database persistence, publishing adapter, AI video generation, production sync, or final canon decision exists.
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'tools/fff-extract-local.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json', 'artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/sample-project-state.json', 'artifacts/current-project-state.json', 'artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json', 'artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/local-extraction-adapter-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-validator-hardening-review.md', 'docs/review/extraction-contract-review.md', 'docs/review/freeform-review-intake.md', 'docs/data-model.md', 'docs/idea-ledger.md', 'docs/decision-log.md', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-local-extraction-adapter-spike-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_artifact_id -ne 'fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001') { throw 'Preserved artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-extract-local.mjs artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-smoke-result.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $smoke = Get-Content artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $smoke.passed) { throw 'Local adapter smoke failed' }; if ($smoke.output.elementCount -ne 12 -or $smoke.output.profileCandidateCount -lt 1 -or $smoke.output.claimCandidateCount -lt 1 -or $smoke.output.timelineEntryCandidateCount -lt 1) { throw 'Local adapter smoke output mismatch' }; if (-not $smoke.guardStatus.noModelApi -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.reviewSafeDefaults -or -not $smoke.guardStatus.humanAuthorityBoundaries) { throw 'Local adapter guard mismatch' }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @('fff-local-extraction-adapter-spike-001', 'fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001', 'fff-extraction-contract-001', 'Local extraction adapter', 'Extraction Contract', 'Claim Ledger', 'Timeline View', 'Profile/Ghost Flow', 'Toma fate', 'brass moth truth', 'Council motive') | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; @('artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png', 'artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png') | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ('Empty visual artifact: ' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'Local extraction adapter validation passed' }
validation_result: passed 2026-06-20T00:00:00+09:00; current/sample project-state validation passed, local deterministic adapter generated artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-output.json from artifacts/sample-raw-memo.md, adapter output validated as fff.extractionContract.v1 with unknown-field preservation warning for adapterTrace, fixture matrix passed with 7 fixtures and 0 mismatches, local adapter smoke passed guard checks for no model/API behavior, source refs, review-safe defaults, human authority boundaries, profile-buffered visual assets, and freeform review, Review Hub browser smoke passed with no console errors, screenshot/contact sheet regenerated, git diff whitespace check passed, and MkDocs strict build passed with non-fatal Material upstream warning plus nav-info messages for review docs
review_prompt_hint: Review the deterministic adapter output in natural language. Useful feedback can mention missing extraction classes, weak source spans, unsafe candidate routing, overconfident review status, or cases that should remain review debt before model/API integration.
next_action: Review the local adapter output, then decide whether the next slice should broaden deterministic source mapping or prepare a model/API adapter behind the same validator boundary. Keep output source-tracked, review-held by default, and blocked from auto-canon promotion.
